sections.5.1: „MOST Danych repository of Gdańsk University of Technology," prosze zamienic na MOST Wiedzy Open Research Data Catalog (Bridge of Data)
sections.5.2:
„Data will be archived using institutional infrastructure and trusted repositories, including MOST Danych repository, for a minimum period of 10 years." zamiast tego - 

Data will be archived using institutional infrastructure and trusted repositories, including MOST Wiedzy repository. This repository is CoreTrustSeal certified. This certificate confirms the repository's trustworthiness and sustainability. Data deposited there will be automatically categorised for long-term storage without an expiration date. Moreover, all data not selected for sharing will be stored by the PI for at least 10 years after the project is finished, and access to them will be possible upon direct request with the PI's consent.
